lenses.guidance: vv 7-11's Atonement-day offerings echo Lev 16's procedure forward into the calendar; vv 12-38's Tabernacles offerings (descending bull count) thread across Scripture toward Zech 14:16-19's eschatological feast and Rev 7:9's palm-bearing nations.

vv 1-6's trumpets, vv 7-11's atonement, vv 12-38's booths frame the autumn cluster as covenant climax. The redemptive arc that opened in Exodus closes its fiscal year here — call, cleansing, and dwelling-with arranged in sequence.
